creator: kuriyama@opt.phys.waseda.ac.jp
text:
I've updated and modified ports-current/databases/gnats.
        Modifications are :

        1) package building enable
        2) add uid 61 (gnats) automatically if system has no account 
           which uid "gnats"
        3) follow install-info guideline (FreeBSD Handbook)
        4) Strip binaries
        5) not to install compiled emacs lisp (*.elc)
        6) gnats' path in some messages are corrected

        [Updated files] :
                Makefile
                patches/patch-aa
                pkg/DESCR
                pkg/MESSAGE
                pkg/PLIST

        [Added files] :
                patches/patch-ae
                patches/patch-af
                pkg/INSTALL

        [Removed files] :
                scripts/pre-install

        I put gzipped and uuencoded diff file in "Fix:".
